title: Resolution approving the Supplemental investment Program (SIP) for Supplemental Appropriation amounting to Fifty-Nine Million Five Hundred Three Thousand Nine Hundred pesos and 71/100 (Php 59,503,900.71) for General Fund Proper; One Million Four Hundred Forty-Five Thousand One Forty-Six pesos and 37/100 (Php 1,445,146.37) for Market Enterprise; and One Hundred Seventy-Two Thousand Three Hundred Fourteen pesos and 91/100 (Php 172,314.91) for Slaughterhouse and for the reversion of funds from Capi
